name: @emotionalamo/plugin-extratheme
description: Global theme-enhancement plugin for NocoBase 2.x: custom background (image/gradient/color + fit modes), transparency, frosted-glass, top/side navigation styling, global font (system/custom/uploaded), and macOS-style scrollbar. Configured globally in one settings page; disabled by default.
description.zh-CN: NocoBase 2.x 全局主题增强插件：自定义背景（图片/渐变/纯色 + 铺法）、透明度、毛玻璃、顶部/侧边导航栏样式、全局字体（系统/自定义/上传）、仿 macOS 滚动条。设置页统一全局配置，默认关闭。
